title: odostemon repens
intro: Odostemon repens, also known as creeping snowberry, is a low-growing, woody shrub native to the mountainous regions of the northwestern United States and Canada. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Odostemon repens include its ability to reduce swelling and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to help manage digestive issues and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Odostemon repens can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
